natural_language_query: Show total revenue by region last quarter
generated_sql: SELECT region, SUM(revenue) FROM sales WHERE quarter='Q2-2026' GROUP BY region

natural_language_query: List top 10 customers by order value
generated_sql: SELECT customer_name, SUM(order_value) AS total FROM orders GROUP BY customer_name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

natural_language_query: How many support tickets were opened this week
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tickets WHERE created_at >= DATE('now','-7 days')

natural_language_query: Average order value by product category
generated_sql: SELECT category, AVG(order_value) FROM orders JOIN products USING(product_id) GROUP BY category

natural_language_query: Employees hired in the last 6 months
generated_sql: SELECT name, hire_date FROM employees WHERE hire_date >= DATE('now','-6 months')
SELECT month, SUM(revenue) FROM sales WHERE year=2026 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
SELECT product_name, inventory_count FROM inventory WHERE inventory_count < 0
SELECT cohort, churn_rate FROM customer_cohorts ORDER BY cohort

natural_language_query: Support tickets resolved by agent this month
generated_sql: SELECT agent_name, COUNT(*) FROM tickets WHERE status='Resolved' GROUP BY agent_name

natural_language_query: Top 5 marketing channels by conversion rate
generated_sql: SELECT channel, conversion_rate FROM marketing_channels ORDER BY conversion_rate DESC LIMIT 5
